items.name: Golden Chakram of the Sky Palace
items.description: This chakram was said to belong to a reclusive group of ninjas so enlightened that it was said they could communicate with inanimate objects. Legend has it they never carried more than one weapon, because they could call out to it from anywhere in the world, and it would always faithfully return.
